title: vitex trifolia var. obovata
intro: Vitex trifolia var. obovata, also known as the blue chaste tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Vitex trifolia var. obovata include its ability to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce fever, and exhibit antioxidant effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
